principals_human_invariant.name: principals_human_invariant
principals_human_invariant.value: "principals"."kind" <> 'human' OR ("principals"."external_idp" = 'clerk' AND "principals"."external_id" IS NOT NULL AND "principals"."tier" IS NOT NULL)

principals_agent_invariant.name: principals_agent_invariant
principals_agent_invariant.value: "principals"."kind" <> 'agent' OR ("principals"."external_idp" IS NULL AND "principals"."service_name" IS NULL)

principals_service_invariant.name: principals_service_invariant
principals_service_invariant.value: "principals"."kind" <> 'service' OR ("principals"."service_name" IS NOT NULL AND "principals"."service_version" IS NOT NULL)

principals_tier_org_invariant.name: principals_tier_org_invariant
principals_tier_org_invariant.value: "principals"."tier" IS NULL OR "principals"."tier" = 'seeker' OR "principals"."org_id" IS NOT NULL

signing_keys_active_per_purpose_idx.name: signing_keys_active_per_purpose_idx
signing_keys_active_per_purpose_idx.where: "signing_keys"."activated_at" IS NOT NULL AND "signing_keys"."retired_at" IS NULL
